code:
import io
import string

fn process(_ line: String) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut in_word = false
  mut started = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        in_word = false
      else
        mut c = b
        if not in_word
          if started
            out = "#{out} "
          end
          started = true
          in_word = true
          if c >= 97 and c <= 122
            c = c - 32
          end
        end
        out = "#{out}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  println(process(line))
when None
  println("")
end
